description: Fast documentation chain for README, guide, and runbook updates that still require evidence-backed closure.
common_instructions: Keep docs accurate to the live codebase.
Avoid broad rewrites when a focused correction is enough.

instructions: Identify audience, doc target, and acceptance criteria.

writes: scoped documentation artifacts from the accepted brief
instructions: Patch the documentation and verify examples against current code where practical.
Close only when the doc change is accurate, scoped, and linked to evidence.
